title: Vertical thruster
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Vertical thrusters''' were a form of propulsion installed on [[T-65XJ X-wing starfighter]]s. [[Kyp Durron]] installed them under order by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] to make it go faster.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]''

[[Category:Starfighter engines]]
